name: Leone; False Hit
description:
Have not seen Akame Ga Kill yet :[

however, big titty assassin is :]

This does have some improvisations added to it, fair warning.

Being a the kid of a noble family was...interesting, even more so when your family directly worked under the Emperor. Something you learned being the child of an Imperial Noble Family was that everyone was shit. Your parents had been shit, your family was shit, and the nobility was shit. Everyone in power was some flavor of evil, with some truly pushing the depravity of humanity to a new low. You swore that one day you even caught your father being quite aggressive with one of the maids. Though, like most nobles tend to do nowadays, they'd be found dead in their rooms. Something about a slit throat. Now with you being the head of the family, years later into adulthood, you were gonna be a shining example of what a noble could be! Until tonight..

[[This was a request made on my Request Form by Anonymous User]]
